title: StellarMC Paintings
body:
> **Disclaimer:** This resource pack is made by members of the StellarMC server and is **NOT** official or affiliated with the server. # StellarMC Paintings Resource Pack A custom collection of painting replacements showcasing memorable builds, moments, scenery from the various seasons of the StellarMC server. - Highlights from Seasons 2–6: dragon fights, builds, landscapes, and some non–in-game paintings. --- ## 📸 Previews
--- ## 💡 Credits **Pack Compiled By** _Causion & Haage --- ## 🤝 Contributions | Painting Title | Contributor | |----------------------------|-----------------| | Polar Bear | _Causion | | Season 2 Dragon Fight | _Causion | | Light House | AuroraDiamondis | | Serene Autumn (Artwork) | AuroraDiamondis | | Dino Group | Haage | | S5 End Room | Haage | | Season 4 Dragon Fight | Haage | | Season 5 Dragon Fight | Haage | | Season 6 Dragon Fight | Haage | | British Town | Rat_100 | | Nether Bee | JoProsiah | | Season 3 Dragon Fight | JoProsiah | | Karl Sub | Karlsson1000 | | StellarMC Logo | Karlsson1000 | | kSMP Logo | Karlsson1000 | | End Island | Markoy2011 | | TotemStache | OoohItsKeith | | karlbet | OoohItsKeith | | Dr.House | unknown | | S5 Shops | | | S5 Spawn | |
